articles.title: LatentSkill: From In-Context Textual Skills to In-Weight Latent Skills for LLM Agents
articles.excerpt: Agent systems increasingly use textual skills to encode reusable task procedures, but injecting these skills into the prompt at every step incurs substantial context overhead and exposes skill content as plaintext. We present LatentSkill, a framework that converts textual skills into plug-and-play L
articles.summary: 代理系统使用文本技能时，反复注入提示会带来高上下文开销。LatentSkill框架将文本技能通过持续预训练转换为即插即用的LLM权重模块，压缩了技能知识。实验表明，该方法减少了约50%的推理成本，同时保持或提升了性能。

articles.title: SwiftVR: Real-Time One-Step Generative Video Restoration

articles.summary: 实时视频恢复要求在严格单帧延迟下生成高清输出，现有一步扩散模型因高分辨率下的二次计算瓶颈难以部署。论文提出SwiftVR，通过联合蒸馏与神经架构搜索进行优化，在消费级GPU上实现了实时4K视频恢复。

articles.title: SearchSwarm: Towards Delegation Intelligence in Agentic LLMs for Long-Horizon Deep Research

articles.title: EEVEE: Towards Test-time Prompt Learning in the Real World for Self-Improving Agents

Existing methods are largely designed for single-dataset settings, while real-world applications require models to handle het
articles.summary: EEVEE是首个面向LLM代理的多数据集测试时提示学习框架。现有方法主要针对单数据集，而EEVEE能处理真实世界中异构任务流，实现测试时自适应提示优化，使代理无需重新训练即可在线适应新任务。

articles.title: SlimSearcher: Training Efficiency-Aware Web Agents via Adaptive Reward Gating

articles.title: One Token per Multimodal Evidence: Latent Memory for Resource-Constrained QA
articles.excerpt: External memory effectively grounds large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs)-based question answering (QA) in relevant multimodal evidence. However, existing memory paradigms represent each memory item in raw text and image forms, so retrieval-based systems must pass the retrie
articles.summary: 针对资源受限的问答任务，现有外部记忆以原始文本图像形式存储每个项目，导致检索开销大。论文提出“一个证据一个标记”的潜变量记忆，用单个潜向量表示证据，将记忆大小压缩至原方法的数百分之一，同时保持性能。

articles.title: Light-WAM: Efficient World Action Models with State-Fusion Action Decoding
articles.excerpt: World Action Models (WAMs) extend robot policy learning by incorporating future prediction as an additional training objective, encouraging the policy to encode task-relevant temporal structure in its representations. Current WAMs often rely on large-scale generative architectures that incur high tr
articles.summary: 当前世界动作模型依赖大型生成架构，训练和推理成本高。论文提出Light-WAM，采用状态融合动作解码结构，在减少计算量的同时保留了WAM学习时序表征的优势，实现了更高效的机器人策略学习。

articles.title: OmniCap-IF: Benchmarking and Improving Instruction Following Abilities for Omni-Video Captioning
articles.excerpt: While Omni-modal Large Language Models (OLLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in jointly processing audio and visual streams, their ability to strictly adhere to complex, multi-faceted user instructions remains largely unexplored. Existing benchmarks primarily focus on holistic video unde
articles.summary: Omni-modal大模型遵循复杂多面指令的能力尚未被充分探索。论文提出OmniCap-IF基准，专门评估全模态视频描述中的指令遵循能力，并通过指令数据增强等方法显著提升了模型性能。

articles.title: Liberating LLM Capabilities in Full-Duplex Speech Models
articles.excerpt: Speech-based large language models are typically constrained to spoken replies, which limits their user-facing outputs to what can be verbalized and suppresses text-native capabilities such as code generation, structured analysis, and multi-step reasoning in realtime interaction, for tasks that requ
articles.summary: 语音大模型通常只能进行口头回复，限制了其在实时交互中执行代码生成、结构化分析等文本密集型任务的能力。论文提出通过中间文本输出解耦语音输入和文本推理，从而释放了模型的文本原生能力。

articles.title: Answer Presence Drives RAG Rewriting Gains
articles.excerpt: Retrieval-augmented QA pipelines often route retrieved passages through an LLM rewriter before a smaller reader, lifting F1 by tens of points on multi-hop benchmarks; this gain is typically credited to improved evidence quality. We ask whether that lift is causally driven by the gold answer string a
articles.summary: RAG重写器能带来显著F1提升，通常归因于证据质量改善。论文研究发现，性能提升主要源于重写后答案文本的存在本身，而非证据质量。一个简单的答案注入方法即可实现大部分性能增益。

articles.title: Reasoning Arena: Trace Tournaments When Verifiable Rewards Fall Short
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a leading paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models through outcome-based supervision. However, verifiable rewards frequently become uninformative at the group level: when all sampled traces of a given promp
articles.summary: 当所有采样轨迹都正确或都错误时，基于结果的可验证奖励在组内变得不具信息量。论文提出Reasoning Arena竞赛范式，通过轨迹锦标赛引入相对信号，为RLVR在奖励平坦区域提供了有效的优化目标。

articles.title: How Does Reasoning Flow? Tracing Attention-Induced Information Flow for Targeted RL in LLMs
articles.excerpt: Token-level credit assignment remains a key obstacle for reinforcement learning (RL) in large language models (LLMs), where RL recipes typically treat all tokens equally, failing to distinguish decisive reasoning steps from routine formatting or fluent filler. Recent attempts leverage model-internal
articles.summary: LLM的RL训练中，通常将所有标记平等对待，导致难以识别关键推理步骤。论文通过追踪注意力诱导的信息流，分析了推理如何传播，为定向优化关键推理标记的信用分配提供了方法。

articles.title: Online Skill Learning for Web Agents via State-Grounded Dynamic Retrieval
articles.excerpt: Language agents increasingly rely on reusable skills to improve multi-step web automation across related tasks. A growing line of work studies online skill learning, where agents continually induce skills from previous task trajectories and reuse them in future tasks on the fly. However, existing me
articles.summary: 现有在线技能学习方法仅从单一成功轨迹中提取技能，鲁棒性差。论文提出基于状态锚定的动态检索方法，从成功和失败经验中学习技能，并在执行时动态检索和组合技能，提升了网页代理的泛化能力。

articles.title: Text-to-Image Models Need Less from Text Encoders Than You Think
articles.excerpt: Text-to-image models rely on text prompts as their primary interface to human intent. Prompts are encoded by a text encoder into embeddings that condition the image generation process. Beyond individual token meanings, text embeddings encode contextual information across the full prompt, such as com
articles.summary: 论文研究发现，文生图模型对文本编码器的依赖程度低于预期。即使是部分损坏的文本嵌入，模型仍能生成高质量图像，表明模型主要从文本中捕获了粗粒度语义，这为轻量化文本编码器提供了理论依据。

articles.title: Bridging the Agent-World Gap: Text World Models for LLM-based Agents
articles.excerpt: Large language model (LLM)-based agents are increasingly used in interactive textual environments, from web navigation and code editing to tool use and long-horizon dialogue. Yet many remain largely reactive, mapping observations to actions without an explicit model of how these environments are str
articles.summary: 基于LLM的代理多为反应式，缺乏对交互环境的显式建模。论文提出为文本环境构建结构化的文本世界模型，通过模型预测未来状态来指导代理决策，从而弥补了代理与环境之间的理解鸿沟。

articles.title: AsyncWebRL: Efficient Multi-Step RL for Visual Web Agents
articles.excerpt: Training vision-language web agents with multi-step RL is compute-intensive, with two dominant forms of inefficiency: idle GPUs in synchronous RL, and trajectories that use more steps and tokens than necessary. We present AsyncWebRL, which addresses both. On the system side, an asynchronous design o
articles.summary: 视觉网页代理的多步RL训练存在GPU闲置和计算浪费两大低效问题。论文提出AsyncWebRL，通过异步系统设计减少空闲，并引入自适应轨迹截断，显著提升了训练吞吐量和样本效率。

articles.title: What Should Agents Say? Action-state Communication for Efficient Multi-Agent Systems
articles.excerpt: Multi-agent systems (MAS) built on large language models are typically organized around roles, pipelines, and turn schedules, while the content that agents pass to one another is often left as unconstrained natural language. However, this free-form communication can rapidly inflate token usage, cons
articles.summary: 多智能体系统中，自由形式的自然语言通信会导致令牌使用膨胀和协调效率低下。论文提出结构化的“动作-状态”通信协议，要求代理仅传递关键动作意图和状态信息，有效减少了通信开销并提升了任务性能。

articles.title: SDR: Set-Distance Rewards for Radiology Report Generation

articles.summary: 针对胸片报告生成，标准精确匹配奖励与报告的无序正交特性不兼容。论文提出Set-Distance Rewards奖励，将报告视为集合，通过集合距离计算奖励，更准确地评估了生成报告与参考报告的相似性。
